arts.ttl: Lewis Hall’s audition adds intrigue to England’s Nations League finale
arts.sum: In-form Newcastle defender has chance to show Thomas Tuchel he can be solution to perennial problem on left Expectations are low before England close their uneven Nations League campaign with Thursday’s trip to Greece and Sunday’s home game against the Republic of Ireland. The withdrawals are piling up, fatigue is rising and Thomas Tuchel has decided that he has better things to do than show up to watch the team that he will inherit from Lee Carsley in January. Yet there is still meaning to be found in these fixtures and if Tuchel could ask for one favour from Carsley it would surely be to leave him a functioning left-back. England, who clambered to the final of Euro 2024 with the right‑footed Kieran Trippier dutifully playing on his weaker side while Luke Shaw battled for full fitness, are crying out for someone to step up and make the position their own. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Lewis Hall ‘completely different player’ to the one Thomas Tuchel had at Chelsea
arts.sum: A 17-year-old Hall was given his first senior appearance by the Tuchel in Chelsea’s FA Cup win over Chesterfield in 2022.

arts.ttl: England injury news: Tuchel 'blamed' for huge spike in withdrawls ahead of UEFA Nations League double-header
arts.sum: Premier League clubs are reportedly blaming the FA and Thomas Tuchel for the high number of injury withdrawals from the England squad this week.

arts.ttl: Why Lewis Hall can see stars aligning to leave him perfectly poised to meet England’s biggest need
arts.sum: Injured left-backs and out of position right-backs leave the Newcastle defender primed to stake his claim

arts.ttl: Lewis Hall explains debt to Thomas Tuchel as he seeks to solve England's problem position
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel gave Lewis Hall his first team debut when they were together at Chelsea in an FA Cup win over Chesterfield in January 2022

arts.ttl: Taylor Harwood-Bellis' England journey helped by his Stockport mascot Dad and Roy Keane
arts.sum: While his family have been heavily involved in Stockport, Harwood-Bellis played all his junior and youth football at Manchester City and had been tipped for a big future under Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Curtis Jones explains how Arne Slot has turned him into a star for Liverpool and England
arts.sum: Curtis Jones is in the England squad for the third time in his career, but the Liverpool star is finally set to take to the pitch in the Nations League double-header

arts.ttl: 4 players who must seize England chance as World Cup 2026 countdown starts
arts.sum: Players from Liverpool, Chelsea and Manchester City could take advantage of the numerous absences from England's November squad.
